name: Block Change
desc: Updates a single block in the world — position and new block state (combined ID+metadata).

implementation.overview: S23PacketBlockChange sets a single world block. Combined block state = blockId (lower 12 bits) + metadata (next 4 bits). Sent for every block change: mining, placing, explosion, pistons, fire, bed placement/break. BlockESP/BedFinder modules read S23 to detect specific blocks appearing. XRay modules cancel S23 to prevent world updates (revealing ores in already-loaded chunks).

modules.name: BlockESP / BedFinder (Rise 6.0 / Sigma 4.11)
modules.purpose: Track S23 to detect when specific blocks appear: beds (block ID 26), chests (54), diamond ore (56). Store positions for ESP rendering.
modules.how_it_works: Read block position and blockState from S23. Decode blockId = state & 0xFFF. If matching a target block, add position to ESP list. If blockId=0 (air), remove from list.

implementation.general_hooks:
Client: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleBlockChange(S23PacketBlockChange). BlockESP reads blockId from state. Cancelling prevents world update.

Server: WorldServer.setBlockState() broadcasts S23 to tracking players.
